artifact.name: Example product landing page
artifact.primary_task: Understand the product and decide whether to start a trial

content_grounding.evidence: Three outcome claims have no cited source.

task_structure.evidence: The primary action is visible, but benefits repeat in three sections.

visual_entropy.evidence: Four surface styles and three CTA treatments were counted.

typography_spacing_alignment.evidence: Hierarchy is readable; secondary copy appears faint.

component_necessity.evidence: Two card grids repeat the same points.

image_relevance_authenticity.evidence: Hero art is decorative and no real product view is supplied.

accessibility.evidence: Only a screenshot was available; contrast and focus were not measured.

findings.signal: Three sections repeat the same outcome claims.
findings.impact: Increases scanning cost without adding evidence.
